finding_results.notes: The reveal now gives Kai and the reader a visible artifact before inference: the repeated `MERIDIAN ATHLETE FIRMWARE / INTERNAL` header and matching certificate ID appear in both columns, and Yusuf ties that package directly to the signed fix's server check. The scene also states the limit of proof: he cannot prove who inside Meridian authorized the design.
Tomas's blackout beat now stays in body-first athlete language: legs driving, arms cutting, sprint pattern holding, no subsystem or firmware jargon.
Kai's confrontation line now uses a Kai-specific stress tell: his voice goes low instead of flattening.
Only two explicit age mentions remain in the chapter.
The opening track beat and late confrontation no longer restate Kai's ache; the corridor line is the only retained wrist/shoulder ache passage.
Kai now enters the bay through its wrong, body-ready emptiness rather than a repeated processing-hum/habituation description.
The chapter keeps the strongest Birmingham beat at the doorway and rephrases later pressure beats through speed, polish loss, and stripped distance instead of renaming the accent shift.

summary: Revised chapter 14 in place to keep Tomas's catastrophe body-close, make the Meridian link legible through a concrete on-screen artifact, align Kai's confrontation voice with the style bible, and reduce the chapter-local repetition/image-density flagged in the packet while preserving the chapter's revelation engine and ending state.
